arts.ttl: Real Madrid star speaks out on his future
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Dani Ceballos has on Sunday provided a fresh insight into his future with the club. And the news will no doubt be met with a collective smile…

arts.ttl: Barcelona fans highlight another officiating inconsistency after Real Madrid 4-1 Las Palmas
arts.sum: Supporters of Barcelona have taken to social media once more on Sunday evening, to make their frustrations with alleged inconsistencies in La Liga’s officiating clear. This comes owing to developments…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid and Barça‘s possible rivals in Copa del Rey quarter-final: who could they face?
arts.sum: Barcelona, Atlético Madrid, Getafe, Leganés, Valencia, Real Sociedad, Real Madrid and Osasuna are the remaining teams who will discover their fate on Monday afternoon with then next round games (to be played as a single match) earmarked to be played on February 4,5 and 6. FC Barcelona are one of the teams that no-one will want to draw.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid penalty-taker pecking order after Mbappé strike vs Getafe
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Sunday reiterated the penalty-taker pecking order in his squad. Real, of course, benefitted from a spot-kick decision earlier today, during the club’s…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “We gave a complete and rounded performance, with lots of quality and attitude”
arts.sum: “I'm not going to say that we’re the ones who play the best football, but we don't play so badly either. We managed to get the right balance to handle the good moments and the difficult ones.”

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti surpasses Real Madrid milestone with win over Las Palmas
arts.sum: Real Madrid beat Las Palmas 4-1 at the Bernabéu this afternoon with a brace from Kylian Mbappé as well as goals from Brahim Diaz and Rodrygo. Whilst there was plenty…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid injury boost: Could return of key player spark Champions League run by Carlo Ancelotti?
arts.sum: David Alaba's return could be vital for Real Madrid's ambition of winning the Champions League, as Carlo Ancelotti looks to prove his doubters wrong again.

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 4-1 win vs Las Palmas
arts.sum: It is good to have each Mbappe performance be better than the last, especially since the Barcelona game. One of the biggest talking points, and the only positive from that loss to Barcelona was the definite return to form for Kylian Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Florentino Pérez set to continue as Real Madrid president until 2029
arts.sum: Real Madrid began the election process for their club president on January 7th, however, an election wasn’t needed to decide who will lead the club into the future. As the…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti labels Real Madrid star ‘the best in the world’ after
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Sunday evening moved to lavish praise on Kylian Mbappé. This comes fresh off nothing short of a spectacular individual display conjured up…
